author: Ethan
name: QAT Int4 → 16 Layers
blurb: Int4 nibble-packing (2 weights/byte) allows 16 transformer layers in the same 16MB budget as SOTA's 10 — a 60% parameter increase. Quantization-Aware Training with straight-through estimators activates at 15% of training iterations, nudging weights to cluster near int4 grid points before export. All SOTA techniques carried forward (Muon WD=0.02, FP16 tied embed, Overtone init, U-Net skips). Stability adjustments: matrix_lr=0.030, Muon momentum=0.97, grad_clip=1.0. Pending H100 run results.
